# @vmvarela/tsconfig

Shared TypeScript configurations for @vmvarela projects.

## Usage

```json
{
  "extends": "@vmvarela/tsconfig/tsconfig.base.json",
  "compilerOptions": {
    "outDir": "./dist",
    "rootDir": "./src"
  }
}
```

### For semantic-release plugins

Add `@types/semantic-release` and configure types:

```json
{
  "extends": "@vmvarela/tsconfig/tsconfig.base.json",
  "compilerOptions": {
    "outDir": "./dist",
    "rootDir": "./src",
    "types": ["node", "semantic-release"]
  }
}
```

## Requirements

- Node.js >= 24
- TypeScript >= 5.5
